widgets_values:
MOEBIUS FACE INPAINT - portrait / face retouching

Same pipeline as the general example, but with the ft_ffhq checkpoint: Moebius fine-tuned on FFHQ, a large dataset of diverse face close-ups. It reconstructs facial skin, hair and features far better than the general model. Typical uses: remove glasses, a hand in front of the face, tattoos, blemishes, watermarks over a portrait, or repair occluded face regions.

Tips for faces:
- ft_ffhq for close-ups / selfies; ft_celebahq for studio-style portraits; if the face is small inside a larger scene, the general 'pretrained' often works better.
- mask_dilate 4 is preset here: face edits usually benefit from a slightly grown mask so no rim of the removed object survives.
- The model regenerates ONLY the masked area (paste ON) - identity outside the mask is untouched. The larger the masked face area, the more the reconstructed identity may drift: mask tightly.
- Still no text prompt: you choose WHERE, the model decides WHAT fits there.
nodes.title: About this workflow
Load a portrait → right-click → Open in MaskEditor
